title: Ukraine strikes knock out power in key city in Russian-occupied Crimea
summary_full: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.
summary_public: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.
